query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.supplierName, s.status,
  s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.dataSource,
  s.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName,
  s.serviceId, s.connectionId, s.locationAddress
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE (
  s.locationAddress LIKE '%Barcaldine%'
  OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Emerald%'
  OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Maryborough%'
  OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Rockhampton%'
  OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Tewantin%'
  OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Torquay%'
  OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Coolum%'
  OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Varsity%'
  OR s.customerName LIKE '%Serenity%'
  OR s.customerName LIKE '%ARM%'
  OR c.name LIKE '%Serenity%'
  OR c.name LIKE '%ARM%'
  OR c.name LIKE '%Varsity%'
  OR c.name LIKE '%Community Lifestyle%'
)
ORDER BY s.status, s.supplierName;

SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.supplierName, s.status,
  s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.dataSource,
  s.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName,
  s.serviceId, s.connectionId, s.locationAddress
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE (
  s.locationAddress LIKE '%Barcaldine%'
  OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Emerald%'
  OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Maryborough%'
  OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Rockhampton%'
  OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Tewantin%'
  OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Torquay%'
  OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Coolum%'
  OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%Varsity%'
  OR s.customerName LIKE '%Serenity%'
  OR s.customerName LIKE '%ARM%'
  OR c.name LIKE '%Serenity%'
  OR c.name LIKE '%ARM%'
  OR c.name LIKE '%Varsity%'
  OR c.name LIKE '%Community Lifestyle%'
)
ORDER BY s.status, s.supplierName;
